title: Direct-to-Operator Discovery
summary: Start with frontline users to validate pain, mission pull, and deployment friction before broad acquisition mapping.

title: PAE / CPE / PEO / Program Office Engagement
summary: Map the office that can sponsor transition, budgeting, integration, and scaling after user pull is clear.

title: Innovation and Fast-Path Vehicles
summary: Use rapid-entry mechanisms when the company is earlier-stage, venture-backed, or still proving government-market fit.

title: SBIR / OTA / CRADA / PIA / Lab Pathways
summary: Pair customer discovery with a contracting path that fits the maturity, IP position, and demonstration needs.

title: Prime / Vehicle / Channel Strategy
summary: When direct award probability is low, use incumbents, vehicles, and channel partners to shorten time to access.
